CATERING
Feed your crowd with delicious fresh made daily donuts from DaVinci’s Donuts. We cater weddings, birthdays, showers and office events, or host a donut birthday party for your little one at one of our locations.
Contact your local DaVinci’s Donuts for more information.
BIRTHDAY PARTIES
INCLUDES:
- 2 Create Your Own Donuts per child
- Mini Chalkboard for each child to keep
- Donut Tower for birthday child
- Donut Toss Game
- Donuts and Coffee for Parents
- Private use of shop
PRICING:
$195 for up to 15 children
PARTY TIMES:
Saturday 4pm-5pm
Contact your local DaVinci’s Donuts for more information.
WEDDINGS
We can make your special day a little sweeter. We can provide customized donut creations as well as displays and delivery/set up (in limited areas).
Contact your local DaVinci’s Donuts for more information.
